name: ember-4-legacy
description: EmberJS 4.x (Jan 2022 – 4.12 LTS Aug 2023) — the Octane-only era. jQuery removed, classic components and Ember.X globals gone, ember-data 4 typing, official TypeScript without ember-cli-typescript, Embroider becomes practical. Use when working in a 4.x codebase, or planning a 4.12 → 5.x upgrade. Includes a 4.12 → 5.x migration skill.
